title: Stellaris — Identify Stars, Constellations & Deep-Sky Objects in Night-Sky Photos
description: Upload a photo of the night sky and Stellaris identifies constellations, named stars, and deep-sky objects with astrometric plate solving. Free, fast, and privacy-friendly.
keywords: star annotator, plate solving, astrometry, constellation finder, night sky identification, deep-sky objects, astrophotography tool, star identifier
ogImageAlt: A night-sky photograph with constellations and stars annotated by Stellaris
